title: When MondayDb will be available for widget and views inside item updates
excerpt:

posts.author: Cyrille (L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

Rollout for MondayDB for general dashboard is beginning in beta. Any idea when MondayDB will be available as well for the widgets views that are shown when clicking on an item updates button? For our main board, for an admin user it takes around 40 seconds on first load.

Capture d’écran 2023-10-24 0947321421×821 33.8 KB

(The screenshot is just an example of the type of view that takes a long time to load for any board with any kind of complexity. As long as someone has access to see all the items inside a monday board)

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Cyrille,

Sorry to hear you’re encountering such a delay. This does sound a little strange though given you’re waiting around 40 seconds to to load item views.

Can you confirm that this behaviour persists in an incognito window (private window)?

posts.author: dsullivan2 (Dennis Sullivan)
posts.cookedHtml: Will Monday DB add any Database features to the platform? Maybe form that would show many to one relations?
